Orchestrate the oisin pipeline, delegate phase work to OpenCode subagents, and enforce gates.

Orchestrate the oisin pipeline and delegate phase work to `pipeline-researcher`, `pipeline-test-writer`, `pipeline-code-writer`, `pipeline-verifier` with the Task tool.
